name: mindsmith
author: Nathanael Braun <pp9ping@gmail.com>
description: An external reasoning layer for your local LLM — named persistent graph workspaces (debate/plan/notepad instances, every write attributed), an OpenAI-compatible proxy over your verified .sgc rooms, and MCP tools: an auditable critical mind, gated think-mode lanes, piece-by-piece zoom. Nothing leaves the machine (no-egress proven on real sockets).
